lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including multiple dents and areas of rust. The interior shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and stains. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to be roadworthy.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and stained. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in mint condition and presents as if it just came off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with no chips or scratches, and the interior remains in pristine state with no signs of wear or aging. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as intended. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been garage-kept and cared for to the highest possible standard.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily transportation. While it remains mechanically sound and drives well, it does show its age with a few minor leaks and a suspension that is starting to feel a bit soft. The exterior features some expected wear, including several surface scratches, minor door dings, and some fading on the plastic trim. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some staining and typical wear on the high-touch surfaces. It’s a reliable car that has been maintained regularly, though it would benefit from some cosmetic TLC and minor mechanical updates over time.

Looking for a budget-friendly project? This vehicle is ready for a new owner who isn't afraid of a little hard work! While it definitely needs some significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get it back in top shape, it's a fantastic opportunity for a mechanic or DIY enthusiast to breathe new life into a classic model at an unbeatable price!

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances sophisticated performance with exceptional value. This unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking reliability without compromise. Rigorously inspected to ensure operational excellence, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. Acquire a high-caliber driving experience at a highly competitive market valuation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next big adventure? I'm selling my well-loved car, and it's in great shape and runs super smoothly! It’s been perfect for my daily commutes and weekend getaways, and I know you’re going to love how it handles. It’s clean, comfy, and honestly just a joy to drive. Drop me a message if you want to come by and take it for a spin—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Available is a 2007 Porsche 911 Carrera (997.1) featuring the revered 3.6L horizontally opposed six-cylinder engine. This power unit delivers linear torque through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis maintains excellent torsional rigidity, with the factory-tuned suspension providing communicative feedback and sharp turn-in. Key preventative maintenance has been addressed, including an IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh Rear Main Seal (RMS) to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. The braking system utilizes four-piston monobloc
Clean title. Well-maintained. Minor interior wear. Mechanically sound. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful use, such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, and all dashboard controls—including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health, having undergone regular synthetic oil changes and a recent multi-point inspection that confirmed the brakes and tires have plenty of life remaining. The engine provides smooth, responsive power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, offering a quiet and composed ride on both city streets and highways. This is a solid, honest car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Offering a refined balance of performance and comfort, it has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A sophisticated choice for those seeking reliability without compromising on prestige.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, the automobile offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic presentation. It serves as a reliable investment for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience and proven durability.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my trusty ride. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been so reliable for me over the years! It drives super smoothly and is just waiting for someone new to take it on some fun adventures. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have!

Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving powerplant delivers 414 hp with a linear torque curve, paired to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a factory-spec limited-slip differential and M-tuned suspension geometry. Recent service includes preventative rod bearing replacement and VANOS inspection, ensuring the valvetrain operates within peak tolerances. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the drivetrain is robust, providing exceptional lateral grip and immediate throttle response for the discerning driver.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Runs well. Ready for immediate sale.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and style, perfect for a discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor, age-appropriate character marks, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of functional electronics, from the crisp infotainment display to the dual-zone climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule, including a recent fluid service and brake inspection. With plenty of tread left on the tires and a solid mechanical history, this car delivers a confident and comfortable driving experience. It is a turnkey example that is ready for the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking both mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Demonstrating consistent care and reliable performance, this unit offers a sophisticated driving experience characterized by its well-preserved interior and robust engineering. We are proud to present this distinguished automobile as an exemplary choice within its class.

This vehicle offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its mechanical reliability and well-preserved aesthetics. A premier selection for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of sophistication and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and it's looking for a new home! It’s been well-loved and is in great shape, running smoothly and ready for all your adventures. Whether you need a dependable commuter or a fun weekend car, this one definitely fits the bill. I’ve taken good care of it, so you can just hop in and go. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered through a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement, and the suspension geometry is maintained by refreshed bushings and dampers. Mechanical maintenance is up to date, ensuring the 7,900 RPM redline is reached with linear precision. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved enthusiast vehicle, the powertrain and drivetrain integrity offer a raw, communicative driving experience.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Minor interior wear. Maintenance up to date.
